name: 7p14_TRG_TCR_gamma_locus
description: T-cell receptor gamma (TRG) locus at 7p14 spanning V-gamma, J-gamma, and C-gamma segments. The TRGV genes show paralogous duplication (TRGV2-8 family at ~85-95% identity) and undergo somatic V(D)J recombination producing extreme clonal diversity. Reference contains germline configuration; mapped reads from T-cell samples carry deletions/joins.

architecture.internal_structure: 14 TRGV segments (6 functional + pseudogenes), 5 TRGJ segments, 2 TRGC constant regions (TRGC1, TRGC2) in tandem; somatic V(D)J recombination creates deletions of intervening DNA.
